dialogueLines.text: Woah!  How the heck did that end up in the water?  You know what... I think you can use that on the ches in the shed but the groundskeeper has the shed locked.  You didn't hear it from me but you can use that to unlock the shed and see what's in that chest.  Maybe if you had some sort of lockpick to open it you would be able to get in.  I'm going to stay here out a little longer but you should be getting home soon.
